name: Carrot Ginger Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon apple butter or jelly (or 1/2 cup fresh finely grated)
2 tablespoons minced dried figs; or prunes
Pour boiling water over the dried figs and macerates for 5-10 minutes, then drain well.
3/4 cup water (or omit milk powder and use milk instead of water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your machine to the temperature recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Add all ingredients in the order suggested by your machine's manufacturer instructions.
3. Process on the Basic Bread Cycle.
4. The aroma will attract visitors, as it did for Katie E Green (kgreen@u.washington.edu).
